evals.prompt: hey can you run a performance test on the financial news agent? i want to see how it's doing with the latest changes
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the skill, execute the test suite against the financial news agent, collect metrics (evaluation scores, timing, token usage), and generate a markdown report with performance statistics

evals.prompt: I need to benchmark the agent before we deploy. Can you measure its performance?
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the skill and run the predefined test queries against the agent, producing a comprehensive performance report with category breakdowns and historical comparison if available

evals.prompt: test the agent and show me the evaluation scores and timing data
evals.expected_output: Should trigger the skill, execute test cases, and display a report with evaluation metrics (accuracy, relevance, coherence, reasonableness) and timing breakdown
